examples.text:
like naproxen and ibuprofen,
work by targeting prostaglandins, they can provide relief
for some people with period pain. Others find hormone-based contraceptives
that thin the uterine lining and, in turn, reduce prostaglandin production
to be helpful. But while prostaglandin research
was foundational
examples.explanation: 像萘普生和布洛芬一样，它们通过靶向前列腺素起作用，可以为一些经期疼痛的人提供缓解。其他人发现，基于激素的避孕药能变薄子宫内膜，进而减少前列腺素的产生，从而感到有帮助。然而，尽管前列腺素的研究是基础性的……

source.text: 3 things that can cause painful periods - Chen X. Chen

reviewSessions.example_text: like naproxen and ibuprofen, work by targeting prostaglandins, they can provide relief for some people with period pain. Others find hormone-based contraceptives that thin the uterine lining and, in turn, reduce prostaglandin production to be helpful. But while prostaglandin research was foundational
reviewSessions.feedback: 理解接近，但词性和含义不完整；uterine 是“子宫的”，不是“子宫”。
matched_points: 与“子宫”相关，抓住了核心对象
